constraints.layout_style: fieldset stacks with legend-only section titles

required_complexity_patterns.notes: At least two fields with aria-label only and no visible label element
Newsletter or login decoy form separate from job application form
Fields inside details/summary or hidden until click
Combobox: button or input with aria-haspopup=listbox plus listbox/options
Multiple controls sharing name attribute groups (checkbox/radio clusters)

reference_templates.title: Reverse DOM field order
reference_templates.notes: Input element appears before its label in DOM (float-right layout pattern)
reference_templates.dom_excerpt: Reverse DOM order

reference_templates.title: Split phone inputs
reference_templates.notes: Country code select and local number in separate inputs
reference_templates.dom_excerpt: Split phone

reference_templates.title: Deep wrapped label
reference_templates.notes: Label without for wraps input three div levels deep
reference_templates.dom_excerpt: Deep wrapped label

prompt_summary: Create a messy, production-real ashby-style job application (single-page, small, tier=high). Widgets: combobox. Required: At least two fields with aria-label only and no visible label element Required: Newsletter or login decoy form separate from job application form Required: Fields inside details/summary or hidden until click Required: Combobox: button or input with aria-haspopup=listbox plus listbox/options Required: Multiple controls sharing name attribute groups (checkbox/radio clusters) Reference DOM (Reverse DOM field order): Input element appears before its label in DOM (float-right layout pattern) Reference DOM (Split phone inputs): Country code select and local number in separate inputs Reference DOM (Deep wrapped label): Label without for wraps input three div levels deep Do NOT produce a tutorial-style form where every field is label[for]+native input. Mix native controls with non-semantic production DOM from the patterns below. Implement ALL required complexity patterns: aria-label-only, decoy-form, details-accordion, custom-combobox, duplicate-name-attrs. Include at least one custom widget (div role=textbox, pill buttons, or listbox combobox). Include at least one labeling strategy besides label-for (aria-label, aria-labelledby, glued spans, placeholder-only). Layout: fieldset stacks with legend-only section titles. Avoid generic centered SaaS card as the only structure. High tier: include shadow DOM host OR iframe apply shell OR wizard/conditional reveal with hidden fields. Mirror structural messiness like these references: Reverse DOM field order; Split phone inputs; Deep wrapped label.
